summary: Excellent matrix recording captures a fun, jam‑filled show highlighted by a standout China > Rider opener and a sweet second set.
review: The three reviewers rave about the performance – describing it as jammy, full of genius moments and hot drum jams – with particular love for the opening China > The Rider sequence and an especially sweet second set. The matrix source is praised for its clear, well‑balanced sound, making this a highly enjoyable listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are strongly positive (5, 4, 5 stars) and comment on both high‑quality sound and a great musical performance; the weighted average of show (≈4.6) and recording (≈4.4) yields ~4.5.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, well‑balanced matrix mix with no reported dropouts or muddiness; reviewers describe the sound as "nice" and "excellent."

show_quality.setlist_flow: Solid first set kicked off by China > Rider, followed by a second set described as unusually sweet and jam‑heavy.

band_member_comments.Drums: Hot drum jams praised for energy and creativity.
